title: Marketplace Manager - Delhivery - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Delhivery - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Delhivery invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Delhivery:
Delhivery is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery!
